name: copilot-qa-suite
description: Post-edit quality assurance for Claude Code, using the GitHub Copilot CLI as a strictly read-only analyst. Single-dispatcher PostToolUse architecture (no parallel fan-out), multi-language doc maintenance (Kotlin, Java, JS, TS, Go, Rust) with configurable comment language, code review across 15+ languages with configurable finding cap, test-coverage analysis with framework detection, ProGuard/R8 rule validation. Per-hook model selection. Plugin-private Copilot config dir. Claude writes, Copilot thinks.
